statement.en: Comparison of natural and synthetic silver zeolites towards the capture of methyl iodide under severe nuclear accident conditions

proposer: Mouheb Chebbi, Hanaa Houjeij, B. Azambre et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or recent) in materials science/nuclear engineering describing experimental comparison of silver zeolite sorbents. The core claims (capture efficacy of synthetic vs natural zeolites for CH₃I under accident conditions) are empirically testable but not yet peer-reviewed in final form. The paper presents provisional experimental results awaiting validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 銀イオンの捕捉力は、秩序と無秩序のあいだで、時間とともに現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 銀イオンが多孔体の籠に囚われ、外部からの毒性物質を吸着する瞬間の対称性。
